violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Food contact surface of utensil/equipment was not properly cleaned and sanitized. Observed employee rinsing tongs in the sink and drying with a towel.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop left on top of ice machine in between uses.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cutting board has deep cuts and is no longer a smooth cleanable surface.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Hood system was missing the vents.--Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Tabletop fryer was not positioned under the hood system.

Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not properly designed and/or constructed to prevent contamination. Label on the inside panel of the ice machine is peeling off and can potentially fall into the ice below.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Customer microwave has excess build up on the inside and needs to be cleaned. Ice dispenser on the pop machine needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The inside of the stand up freezer, the cappuccino machine in the front, the drawers in the customer area, and the counter under the pop machine needs to be cleaned.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Sanitizer was placed in the middle sink due to the 3rd sink not being able to hold water. Sanitizer must be in the 3rd sink for the approved method.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use items stored on top of fridge had the food surface facing up and need to be inverted.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Faucet over the 3 compartment sink was leaking water at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors beneath the prep area have excess build up of debris and need to be cleaned. Wall by the trash can has spillage and needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Missing ceiling tiles in the kitchen/prep area. Broken tiles in the kitchen.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Can see light shining through a gap under the back doors.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
